headline: Smurfit Westrock examines delisting from LSE, closing UK mill
summary: Executives on Thursday’s earnings call took an optimistic tone about the future despite weather and demand contributing to “a challenging quarter.” A newly announced price increase is expected to offset some Q1 cost increases.

headline: Smurfit Westrock slips on Q1 earnings miss despite revenue beat
summary: Smurfit Westrock plc (NYSE:SW) reported first-quarter results on Thursday that fell short of earnings expectations, even as revenue came in ahead of forecasts, sending shares down nearly 6% in premarket trading. Adjusted earnings per share were $0.
